title: Speed For Ghasts
description: Give potions of swiftness to Happy Ghasts to make them fly faster.
body:
![a ghast with text 'speed for ghasts' underneath](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61d479baf63ac82674adb4c612edacfb1b3a1a81_0.webp)

## Speed for Ghasts

Give your Happy Ghasts a boost! This mod allows Speed potions to affect Happy Ghasts when you’re riding them. Simply dismount and use a splash potion and they will go faster!

- Speed I → +40% movement speed
- Speed II → +80% movement speed

You can also change these settings via config in the mod menu so they go even faster, up to 500% faster.

## Requirements

- Fabric Loader ≥ 0.16.0
- Minecraft 1.21.6 – 1.21.8
- Fabric API
